creator: fbsd@www.zefox.net
text:
(In reply to Bob Prohaska from comment #7)
Just tried the experiment and the result is the same.
In my case the usb end was on armv7, the serial end was arm64,
both on Raspberry Pi:

bob@nemesis:~ %         (/dev/pts/1) at 9:30 PST...  BBBBBBBBBBgëB×ÂBBBBgëB×ÂBBBBgëB×ÂBBBBgëB×ÂBBB^@
Badly placed ()'s

It text isn't precisely the same, but somehow output from the serial end
got looped back to the serial input. 

If you can suggest other explorations please do. I've tried both
killing cu with ~~. and killing the entire ssh connection with ~.,
results seem the same.

bob prohaska
